title: A4 Certificate Photo Frame - 21 x 30 CM Aluminum Black Picture Frames with Perspex Safety Glass front, Freestanding and Wall Mountable Pack of 4
features: 【PACKAGE INCLUDES】Set of 4 black aluminium a4 frames, made to display pictures 21 x 30 cm. load your photos,posters,cards, and memories easily, quickly and securely. Perfect for displaying photos of friends or family.

【Easy to Use】The a4 black frames is very easy to install and use without additional tools. Just open the rear bracket by hand, load the photos, and then secure the rear bezel. It is a very convenient and practical photo frame for wall mount and tabletop display.

【Dual Display Style】Our metal A4 picture frames are available in dual display methods to meet your different needs. The photo frame can be placed horizontally or on a table, or it can be hung horizontally or vertically on the wall to show your love for family and friends.

【BEAUTIFUL WALL DECOR 】Black aluminium a4 frames with classic design complements any home or office decor. Great to create your own wall gallery with these multiple photo frames for living room, bedroom, kitchen, office, hotel, dining room, office, bathroom, bar and more.

【PROTECTIVE PACKAGING】Our Frames are wrapped very carefully to ensure safe shipping. For personal use or as a gift to friends. Order with confidence, if any question,contact us at any time,we will try our best to serve you!
description: Product Description Picture Frames Information Size : a4 size (21x30cm) Frame Material : Black Aluminum Metal photo frame Color : Black Cover Material : Plexiglass Frame Orientation : Horizontal or Vertical Placement : Wall Mount or Tabletop Display Packing : Packed in a box Creative Decorating Way These a4 black frames lend itself to a contemporary feel inside your space. The black coloring offers a naturally clean look that allows your art to stand out. Use them for your favorite photos or to display special posters and add a decorative touch to your room. It’s a perfect home ornament for living room, bedroom, kitchen, dorm room, dining room, studio, bathroom, bar etc. You can use this set frames together in one room or spread them throughout the house. Freestanding and Wall Mountable Black Picture Frame Each black picture frame is equipped with a wooden stand displaying on a shelf or table top as well as hooks for hanging on the wall horizontally or vertically. Easy-open tabs on the back let you load your photos quickly and easily. Your Style Your Choice Home, not just a boxy room, but we have to work hard to arrange it so that we feel warm and relaxed at home.Record the beautiful and warm moments in the a4 photo frames, and with all kinds of sizes, you are the decorator of your home. a4 Frame with Plexiglass Front(Perspex Safety Glass) Please note,the a4 frame black with plexiglass front, there is printed protective film on both sides of the clear plexiglass panel. Please remove before use.
